film.title: Ernest Goes to Camp
film.overview: Ernest, a lovable loser who works as a summer camp handyman and dreams of becoming a guidance counselor, must find a way to inspire a group of juvenile delinquents while stopping a shady strip mining company from closing the camp as well.

dialogues.dialogue: each cabin will have a project.  That project should reflect  the proud tradition of Kamp Kikakee.  -- Wow. -- Wow. -- Wow.  The winner of last year's competition

Yeah, the inside's really starting to look nice.  These boys have really jumped into this competition with both feet.  They just needed something to be proud of.  Hey, Crutch , next time I run away from the institute,  I'm gonna build myself one of these things.

Yep, and my boys don't have to go back to the institute,  and this camp has a year-round counselor.  I'm really proud of you , Ernest.  You did what nobody else could have done.  Yep, I guess I'm just a take-charge kind of guy,
dialogues.cause_raw: for accomplishing something nobody else could have done
